[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000111 3
1 1011010 4
2 0010100 2
3 0001110 3
4 0010100 2
5 0000000 a
6 0111011 5
7 1001111 5

01 10 1110100 4
12 21 1001000 2
23 32 1011101 5
34 43 1001110 4

67 76 0010100 2 match 2 4
70 07 0111011 5 match 6

02 20 0111100 4
13 31 0010101 3
24 42 0010011 3
35 53 1010100 3
46 64 0000000 a match 5
57 75 0001110 3 match 3
60 06 0101111 5
71 17 1001111 5 match 7

14 41 1011011 5

36 63 1001110 4

50 05 0110101 4
61 16 1011011 5
72 27 0000111 3 match 0
